conditions: Some operational specifics are under-specified (e.g., how SES-aware proxies would be defined and legally defended; exact mechanics of capacity caps and thresholds).
Several evidentiary entries rely on non-audited or single-source material (noted in the appendix) and a few links are placeholder/example domains rather than primary datasets.
No explicit cost estimates, implementation timelines, or measurable monitoring/evaluation metrics are provided for the proposed transformations.
Stakeholder mapping (e.g., likely actions by church/private maintainers, teacher unions, parental groups) is discussed qualitatively but lacks a structured actor-risk table.
The package flags contested baseline data (implementation_planning-09) but does not include a recommended measurement strategy to establish a shared evidence baseline prior to reform.
content.rationale: The cross-family evaluation accepted the package for human review; the external-use gate remains a human decision.
